title: Coinbase Q1 2026 Financial Results Show Resilient Performance
text: Coinbase reported Q1 2026 financial results showing resilient performance despite crypto market challenges. Company achieved new all-time high crypto trading volume market share reaching 8.6%. Subscription and services revenue grew to $583.5 million, demonstrating strong recurring revenue base. Institutional derivatives trading continued expansion with Deribit acquisition contributing significant volume. Consumer retail activity also showed strength despite overall market headwinds. Balance sheet remains solid with substantial cash reserves supporting future growth investments. Management guidance for Q2 2026 shows revenue expectations rising to $1.6 billion with potential growth to $1.9 billion by Q4. Prediction market business expected to generate $100 million in annualized revenue by end of 2026. Company emphasizing focus on long-term growth drivers including derivatives, stablecoins, and institutional adoption over short-term earnings volatility.
